metrics.name: stackra.region.create.duration_ms
metrics.description: End-to-end provisioning latency (validate country_code + resolve defaults + write row + fire events).

metrics.name: stackra.region.default_changed.total
metrics.description: How often the default region flips per tenant. High rate is a signal — the default drives invoice calculations for legacy rows, changing it often is a red flag.

metrics.name: stackra.region.archived.total
metrics.description: outcome: soft (deleted_at set) / hard (PurgeArchivedRegionsJob completed) / rejected_in_use / rejected_default.

metrics.name: stackra.region.active.count
metrics.description: Point-in-time count of Regions per status per country. Populated hourly by a metrics-collector task.

metrics.name: stackra.region.per_tenant.count
metrics.description: Global histogram of regions-per-tenant. Feeds the tier-adoption dashboard.

metrics.name: stackra.region.default_invariant_drift.count
metrics.description: drift_kind: zero_default / multiple_default. Populated by ReconcileDefaultRegionInvariantJob. Ideally always 0.

metrics.name: stackra.region.tax_config_update.total
metrics.description: field: default_rate_percent / rates / name / inclusive / registration_number / fiscal_year_start_month. Each dotted-path change increments the corresponding label.

metrics.name: stackra.region.slot_exhaustion.total
metrics.description: How often region_slot entitlement quota refuses a Region create. Feeds the upsell funnel.

metrics.name: stackra.region.middleware_resolve.duration_ms
metrics.description: `region.resolve_active` middleware latency. source: header / default_cache / default_db. P99 target < 10ms — the middleware runs on every tenant-plane request.

metrics.name: stackra.region.middleware_reject.total
metrics.description: reason: cross_tenant / paused / archived / tenant_missing_default. Cross-tenant rejects are security-relevant + alerting-worthy.

metrics.name: stackra.region.seed_default.duration_ms
metrics.description: SeedDefaultRegionForTenantJob end-to-end latency. source: tenant_provisioning / reconciler / legacy_backfill_command.

metrics.name: stackra.region.purge_pending.count
metrics.description: Archived Regions past their retention window that haven't been hard-deleted yet. Feeds the `region-purge-queue-drained` health probe.
